title: Rebuild trailers
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild trailers             Quote Post by Kozar927 » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:45 pm Does any one know were I can find HD versions of all the rebuild trailers? I have 2.0 fly me to the moon trailer in HD but im missing the other 2.0 trailer and the 1.0 beautiful world trailer. Can anyone help out an eva nerd looking to complete his collection. By HD I mean As close to 1680x1050 as possible. Thats what my fly me to the moon trailer is and it looks as beautiful as blue ray Thanks in advanced.

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:40 pm There is a chance some of the HQ trailers have not been releases yet. If you know any channels that broadcast-ed them, try calling them and see if management can give them too you. IDK, thats all I can tell ya : /

[]:             Quote Post by Kozar927 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 7:21 pm thanks for your help. If anyone cathes them surface let me know :) Also if anyone wants the fly me to the moon HD trailer PM me

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:24 pm I'll do some looking around for you. If I can't get any, it is more than likely because of licensing rights.

[]:             Quote Post by Kozar927 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:29 pm Thanks a bunch man
